# Getting Support

Thank you for being part of the Ground Zero Community! We want to ensure you get the help you need as quickly and efficiently as possible. Below are the guidelines and channels for seeking support.

## 💬 Discord Support Channels

Our **[Discord Community Server](https://discord.gg/4H2v6UwjmY)** is the primary hub for real-time discussion and support. Depending on your question, please use one of these dedicated channels:

* **[#programming-help](https://discord.com/channels/1173959593123119185/1522594221284917358)**
  * **Use for**: General coding questions, syntax help, debugging code, library recommendations, or architectural advice for your own projects.
* **[#open-source-chat](https://discord.com/channels/1173959593123119185/1522594265975488644)**
  * **Use for**: Questions specifically about contributing to Ground Zero Community open-source projects, setting up repositories locally, or discussing open issues and pull requests.
* **[#general-support](https://discord.com/channels/1173959593123119185/1522594300175716362)**
  * **Use for**: Questions about the Discord server itself (roles, permissions, bot commands), reporting community conduct issues, or general feedback about Ground Zero Community.

---

## 🛠️ GitHub Issues vs. Discord Chat

To help keep our repositories organized and our development focused, please follow these guidelines on where to post:

| Request Type | Where to Go | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **I have a general question or need help debugging my code** | [Discord #programming-help](https://discord.com/channels/1173959593123119185/1522594221284917358) | Ideal for quick back-and-forth chat and peer debugging. |
| **I found a bug in a Ground Zero Community project** | **GitHub Issues** | Search the project's repository issues first. If it hasn't been reported, open a new issue using the **Bug Report** template. |
| **I want to suggest a new feature or improvement** | **GitHub Issues** / [Discord #open-source-chat](https://discord.com/channels/1173959593123119185/1522594265975488644) | Open a **Feature Request** issue, or discuss the idea on Discord first to gather feedback. |
| **I want to contribute code to a project** | [Discord #open-source-chat](https://discord.com/channels/1173959593123119185/1522594265975488644) | Check out our [Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/GroundZeroCommunity/.github/blob/master/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md) and let us know in the channel which issue you'd like to work on! |

---

## 📜 Community Guidelines

* Before asking for help, please make sure you are familiar with our **[Code of Conduct](https://github.com/GroundZeroCommunity/.github/blob/master/.github/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)**.
* When asking for code support in `#programming-help`, try to provide a clear description of the problem, the expected behavior, and code snippets or error logs (use code blocks for readability).
